modelName: Mineral B Carbon Steel Frying Pan
description: The Mineral B 20cm pan is an iconic technical cookware choice for professional chefs seeking natural performance. This variant is uniquely coated with a protective organic beeswax finish, which prevents oxidation and initiates the seasoning process. Its 2.5mm thick carbon steel body ensures exceptional heat retention for searing and browning, while the signature French-curved riveted handle provides ergonomic control. Induction-compatible and PFOA-free, this pan develops a natural non-stick patina with use, making it ideal for individual portions and side dishes in a demanding kitchen.
features: Material: White carbon steel (99% iron, 1% carbon). Thickness: 2.5mm for consistent heat retention. Diameter: 20cm (base approx 14cm). Handle connection: Triple-riveted steel strip, oven safe for short periods (10 mins at 200°C).  Compatibility: All hobs including induction.
uses: Searing steaks, frying eggs, caramelising onions, sautéing vegetables, omelettes.

accessories.name: Beeswax Coating
accessories.description: Protective layer against oxidation (must be removed prior to seasoning)

name: De Buyer Mineral B Carbon Steel Frying Pan
